completed_tasks.name: DB migration 015 + LpEvent model + auth/profile schemas
Service-layer LP rename + economy formula fixes
Numeric payout implementation (later updated to span-based waterfall bands)
Frontend LP rename, heart UI, unlike, bet selector, i18n

decisions.decision: Phase 06 was implemented outside GSD and merged
decisions.rationale: Planning artifacts should reflect merged reality rather than re-planning already shipped work

decisions.decision: Phase 06.1 implementation required human UAT before completion
decisions.rationale: All 6 manual checks passed and the accepted post-UAT fixes are now reflected in planning

decisions.decision: Numeric market payouts now use span-based waterfall bands at 2%, 4%, 8%, and 16% of market range
decisions.rationale: This replaced the earlier window-expansion design and matches the accepted user rule

decisions.decision: Hall of Fame lists BP diverted by payout caps from bp_fund_entries
decisions.rationale: Cap-surplus BP is surfaced as a public leaderboard and linked from TopNav

decisions.decision: Hall of Fame has separate BP and TP tabs
decisions.rationale: BP tab shows capped surplus; TP tab shows cumulative Truth Points so both reputation signals are visible without mixing metrics
Profile tabs now own personal portfolio workflows; notifications, legal-page home links, and OAuth callbacks route to /markets instead of dashboard

context_notes: Phase 05.1 is complete. Phase 06 is implemented and merged. Phase 06.1 is complete, UAT-passed, and includes accepted follow-up fixes to refund math, ledger labels, binary odds, numeric payout bands, and the Hall of Fame page. Quick 260423-ics redesigned Hall of Fame with localized EN/FR/DE labels and separate BP/TP leaderboard tabs. Quick 260423-jh8 removed /dashboard completely; profile tabs replace personal portfolio workflows and all live fallbacks now route to /markets.
